fixes_applied: Removed all upload status and progress indicators from the Dashboard.
Implemented cross-tab abort signaling in Activity Hub using localStorage 'active: false' signal.
Updated DashboardClient to listen for global abort signals and terminate local upload processes.
Refactored stageVideoFile and distributeToPlatforms to check for global abort signals at every step.
Ensured immediate redirect to Activity Hub upon clicking 'Post Video' (or Confirming AI Strategy).
Removed redirect delay and completion overlay for faster feedback loop.
Updated unit and integration tests to match the new UploadForm API.
Fixed E2E timeout by moving localStorage abort signal to the START of handleCancelAll.
Enhanced E2E test robustness with increased poll timeouts.

conditions: All unit and integration tests pass.
All E2E tests (including STOP ALL) pass.
Dashboard redirects immediately and shows no status bars.
Adherence to docs/ and API contracts.
No security vulnerabilities found in diff.

qa-agent.details: All E2E tests passed, including the STOP ALL broadcast signal verification.

conditions: Full E2E test coverage including STOP ALL functionality.
